description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a wraparound porch at the front, supported by white columns and featuring a set of central steps leading to the main entrance. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, and the foundation is finished with a stone veneer. The roof is predominantly gabled with multiple intersecting sections, covered in dark shingles. Windows are arranged in a mix of symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with several double-hung and picture windows visible on all sides. The property includes a driveway with two parked vehicles and a small walkway leading to the porch, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A two-story light-sided house with a wraparound porch, stone foundation, gabled dark roof, and a driveway with parked cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wraparound porch, central steps, main entrance, and driveway with two cars.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the intersecting gabled roofs, upper story windows, and partial view of the porch.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear wall, minimal windows, and the full extent of the roof structure.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the driveway, both vehicles, porch steps, and the side entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, white columns, and decorative railing
